name: refinery_shutdown_worker_heatstroke_redwood_bay_09
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Workplace Safety, the situation tagged internally around refinery shutdown worker heatstroke redwood bay has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The trade is not abstract: it is short term versus long term under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Victor Mensah
agents.identity: I am Victor Mensah, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Workplace Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Advisor Ravi Singh
agents.identity: I am Advisor Ravi Singh, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Workplace Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on long term.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on long term for immediate traction on short term.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Victor Mensah must choose under short term versus long term. What does Victor Mensah do?
